name: Caramelized Coffee Flan
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 3/4 cup granulated sugar in a small heavy saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon, until the sugar crystallizes into lumps (about 15 minutes).
3. Continue cooking, stirring constantly, until the sugar melts and turns a light golden brown (about 15 minutes).
4. Quickly pour the hot caramel mixture into an ungreased 8-inch round cakepan, tilting to coat the bottom evenly. Set aside; the mixture will harden.
5. In a large bowl, combine 2 large eggs and 2 egg yolks with the remaining ingredients (sweetened condensed milk, 1 cup milk, and instant coffee granules).
6. Beat the egg mixture with a wire whisk until the coffee granules dissolve completely.
7. Pour the beaten egg mixture over the caramelized sugar in the cakepan.
8. Place the cakepan in a large shallow baking dish. Pour hot water into the outer baking dish to a depth of 1 inch.
9. Cover the setup with aluminum foil and bake at 350°F for 55 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
10. Remove the pan from the water and let it cool completely.
11. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for at least 8 hours before serving.
12. To serve, loosen the edge of the custard with a spatula and invert onto a serving plate.
